subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Karim! Hearken unto that which the Mystic Dove inspireth thee with, from words of transcendent holiness, and remindeth thee of the remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد الکریم اسمع ما یلهمک الورقا من کلمات قدس علیا و تذکرک بذکر الله و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
